author: Matt
body:
wow – that Hotel Lights sounds GREAT.

I too was a huge BFF fan.

Kick me in the head when the actual album comes out…I don’t want to miss this one!

author: Burgo
body: Glad you like it Matt! And, just to add to your excitement… I should have added that the Hotel Lights album is already out; released Aug 19 :)

author: Cass
body: Wow… that Capital Road track \*does\* sound very much like Dispatch… which I like!

author: las vegas cheap hotels
body: Wow.. those tracks sounded good. Hotel lights Album definitely sounds great…
